features: SINK AND DRAIN CLEANER:The effect of this drain clog remover is very powerful.This sink and drain cleaner powder is great for removing hard water deposits from toilet tanks.This drain blockage cleaner also improves flushing.Also our drain cleaner cleans the pipes and allows the water to flow quickly

SAFE INGREDIENTS:The material of sink cleaner is safe and gentle.Foam drain cleaner adopts a mild formula,drain foam cleaner does not cause damage to pipelines.This sink and drain unblocker is mild to use.You can use drain cleaners repeatedly or wait for hours.Clogged pipes will be relieved by using our clog clearer

BRING FRESHNESS:In addition to unclogging pipes,our sink & drain cleaner is also great for leaving a fresh odor.This sink foam cleaner eliminates unpleasant odors and ensures that your kitchen and bathrooms stay fresh and clean for a long time.This drain cleaner foam can make your indoor environment fresher and more comfortable.Experience the power of foaming drain cleaner and enjoy the benefits of smooth flowing pipes

QUICK CLEANING:Kitchen sink cleaner can effectively remove stubborn stains,and the drain openers keep the surface clean and fresh.The bathroom drain cleaner washes away hundreds of stains and odors.Our powerful pipe dredging agent do the dirty work of household cleaning for you.The pipeline dredging agent gets down to the deep level to break down

GOOD HELPER:This foaming drain can be widely used.Kitchen plumbing,toilets,bathrooms,oil plugs and other drains can use pipe dredging agent.Foam cleaner sink drain expanding can be safely used for all pipes.Sink unblocker foam is suitable for home,office and others.Our drain unblocker foam helps you clean easily.This sink foam will be your good helper
